name: list-files
description: List files in the project using the same filtering rules as the indexer. For git projects, respects .gitignore via `git ls-files --cached --others --exclude-standard`. For non-git projects, applies the project's configured exclude globs. Returns newline-separated paths relative to the project root. Optional glob pattern narrows the result.

pattern.description: Optional glob pattern to filter results. Matched against paths relative to the project root using bash pattern matching (globstar + extglob enabled). NOTE: unlike shell glob expansion, `*` matches across `/` boundaries, so `lib/*.sh` matches any .sh file under lib/ at any depth. Examples: `lib/*.sh` (all shell files anywhere under lib/), `*.md` (markdown anywhere), `helpers/**` (everything under helpers/). Omit to list all files.
